source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260123 태국 Hollywood, 23G 및 P1 등록서류 - 이창민 팀장님/260310 추가 보완/[Portable X-ray System] 260310/11. Safety Declaration.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: H&abyz Co., Ltd. declares no global safety issues for Portable X-ray System model HnX-P1 for 30/01/2025 to 30/01/2026.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Declaration submitted to the Thai Food and Drug Administration Medical Devices Control Division for a medical device application or registration condition context.
keyPoints: No reported deaths associated with intended use in the stated one-year period.
No reported serious deterioration in the state of health of any person in the stated one-year period.
No open field safety corrective actions, including recalls, at the point of submission.
False declarations may be an offence under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562), and other applicable laws.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: I, H&abyz Co., Ltd., the Legal manufacturer and Product Owner

concepts.name: No safety issues globally
concepts.evidence: hereby declare that there are no safety issues globally associated with the use of the medical device(s)

concepts.name: Field safety corrective actions
concepts.evidence: No open field safety corrective actions (including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

concepts.name: Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562)
concepts.pageTarget: Thailand Medical Device Act 2nd Edition B.E.2562
concepts.evidence: Medical Device Act (2nd edition B. E. 2562)

concepts.name: Serious deterioration in the state of health
concepts.pageTarget: Serious Deterioration in State of Health
concepts.evidence: Serious deterioration in the state of health, in relation to a person means: (a) a life-threatening illness or injury

evidence.claim: The document is a Safety Declaration dated January 30th, 2026.
evidence.evidenceText: Safety Declaration Medical Devices Control Division Thai Food and Drug Administration Ministry of Public Health January 30th, 2026

evidence.claim: The declaration is addressed to the Thai Food and Drug Administration Medical Devices Control Division under the Ministry of Public Health.
evidence.evidenceText: Medical Devices Control Division Thai Food and Drug Administration Ministry of Public Health

evidence.claim: H&abyz Co., Ltd. identifies itself as the legal manufacturer and product owner.
evidence.evidenceText: I, H&abyz Co., Ltd., the Legal manufacturer and Product Owner

evidence.claim: The covered medical device is Portable X-ray System model HnX-P1.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name Portable X-ray System Model name HnX-P1

evidence.claim: The declaration covers the period from 30/01/2025 to 30/01/2026.
evidence.evidenceText: in the last one year from 30/01/2025 to 30/01/2026

evidence.claim: No reported deaths were declared for intended use during the stated period.
No reported serious deterioration in the state of health of any person was declared for intended use during the stated period.
evidence.evidenceText: No reported serious deterioration in the state of health 1 of any person
evidence.pageTarget: Serious Deterioration in State of Health

evidence.claim: No open field safety corrective actions, including recalls, were declared at submission.
evidence.evidenceText: No open field safety corrective actions (including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

evidence.claim: The declaration states false declarations may be an offence under Thai Medical Device Acts and other applicable laws.
evidence.evidenceText: making a declaration which I know to be false is an offence under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B. E. 2562) and other applicable laws

evidence.claim: Non-compliance with registration conditions issued by Thai FDA may result in suspension or cancellation of medical device registration.
evidence.evidenceText: any non-compliance with any registration condition issued by the Thai Food and Drug Administration in relation to medical devices registered with the Medical Device Control Division may result in the suspension or cancellation of the medical devices registration

evidence.claim: The signatory is Yunhee KIM, CEO.
